problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: If Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
